response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with 13+ years of software development experience, deep technical breadth (web, mobile, embedded, DLang, Node/TS), and notable community/teaching contributions. However, the role is a Level II Engineering Manager requiring 2+ years of formal people management and 3+ years of technical leadership in developer-tools/build-systems/test-infrastructure at scale, and the resume shows no explicit people-management experience, no direct reports, and limited focus on internal developer productivity tooling for a major mobile platform. Mobile-platform depth is also light (one Apple TV/iOS stint).
strengths: 13+ years of software development with strong full-stack and polyglot breadth
Solid track record in testing, TDD, CI/CD, and developer-tooling adjacent work (Trial, Fluent-Asserts, MCP tooling)
Demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, courses, and open-source projects
concerns: No explicit people-management experience or direct reports mentioned
Limited mobile-platform engineering productivity experience at scale
No clear evidence of leading organizational change or owning team roadmaps
